label: Medium — Publishing Platform
description: Medium — long-form publishing platform. Clean typography, minimal UI. Rich text editor. Login via Google/Twitter/email. Used for reading and publishing articles.
source_patterns: Feed scrolling (topic-based): home feed / topic tag — medium-to-slow vertical scroll, card previews
Article reading: click headline → 2-4s load → deep scroll through long-form content, long pauses
Clap/like interaction: hover clap button (300-600ms) → click → optional hold for multiple claps
Highlight text: select passage → wait 200ms for popup → click highlight icon
Comment: scroll to bottom → click respond → 1-2s think → type → submit
Write/publish flow: click 'Write' → enter title → compose body (slow, thoughtful) → add tags → preview → publish
Login flow: click 'Sign in' → select Google/Twitter/email → complete OAuth redirect

scroll.description: Content reading — deep passes, slow, long pauses for comprehension. Long-form articles 5-15 min read.

login.description: Reading is public, writing/clapping requires login

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate topic feed → scroll (2-4 passes) → click interesting headline → 2-4s read wait → deep scroll through article (slow, long pauses) → optional: clap (click ×1-50) / highlight / scroll to comments → respond → back to feed
